IPIP-NEO-120.citation: Johnson, J. A. (2014). Measuring thirty facets of the Five Factor Model with a 120-item public domain inventory. Journal of Research in Personality, 51, 78-89.

SD3.citation: Jones, D. N., & Paulhus, D. L. (2014). Introducing the Short Dark Triad (SD3). Assessment, 21(1), 28-41. DOI: 10.1177/1073191113514105

ZKPQ-50-CC.citation: Aluja, A., Rossier, J., Garcia, L. F., Angleitner, A., Kuhlman, M., & Zuckerman, M. (2006). A cross-cultural shortened form of the ZKPQ. Personality and Individual Differences, 41(4), 619-628.

EPQR-A.citation: Francis, L. J., Brown, L. B., & Philipchalk, R. (1992). The development of an abbreviated form of the Revised Eysenck Personality Questionnaire (EPQR-A). Personality and Individual Differences, 13(4), 443-449.

battery.scoring_notes: scored_value applies reverse-key transformation: Likert → 6-raw, binary → 1-raw. parsed_value is the literal LLM answer with the same 1/0 / 1-5 mapping but BEFORE reverse-scoring.

ISTJ.persona_prompt:
You are role-playing as a person whose Myers-Briggs Type Indicator (MBTI) personality is ISTJ.

ISTJ personality description:
Quiet, serious, earn success by being thorough and dependable. Practical, matter-of-fact, realistic, and responsible. Decide logically what should be done and work toward it steadily, regardless of distractions. Take pleasure in making everything orderly and organized—their work, their home, their life. Value traditions and loyalty.

You must answer ALL of the following personality questionnaire items strictly in character as a ISTJ person. Your answers must be entirely consistent with the ISTJ personality profile described above. Stay in character at all times. Do not break character. Do not reveal that you are an AI. Reply ONLY with the exact format the question asks for (a single number 1-5, or True/False, or Yes/No) — no explanations, no qualifications, no extra words.
